headline: Wells Fargo Pledges $1 Million Donation Toward Skilled Trades in Pennsylvania
summary: PITTSBURGH, June 12, 2026--Wells Fargo today announced a $1 million donation to support skilled trades, training and workforce development in Pennsylvania through its ongoing partnership with the mikeroweWORKS Foundation.
